name: Lets Make A Deal Pawn & Gun
description_short: Veteran-owned pawn shop in Colorado Springs specializing in firearms, jewelry, electronics, and collateral-based loans at 20% monthly interest.
description_long:
Let's Make A Deal Pawn & Gun is a veteran-owned and operated pawnshop located in Colorado Springs, Colorado. The business operates seven days a week and positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional lending for quick cash needs through collateral-based loans.

The shop offers pawn loans and sales across a wide range of items including firearms (rifles, shotguns, pistols), gold and silver, diamond jewelry, electronics, game systems, cameras, musical instruments, tools, vehicles, and motorcycles. As a Federal Firearms Licensed dealer, they provide additional services including firearm transfers at $45 for the first firearm and $15 for each additional firearm transferred on the same day. They advertise ammunition inventory and specialize heavily in the firearms niche.

The company distinguishes itself through veteran ownership, seven-day-a-week availability, and a transparent loan structure featuring a flat 20% monthly interest rate on all loans. Their FFL licensing and firearm transfer services position them as a full-service option for gun owners beyond basic pawn functionality. The business maintains an online firearms marketplace presence through ARMSLIST and offers downloadable FFL documentation for shipment verification.

Potential borrowers should note that 20% monthly interest (240% annually) is substantially higher than traditional lending options and represents the primary cost of accessing quick cash. While the broad item acceptance and extended hours provide convenience, the high interest rate makes this suitable only for short-term emergency situations. No information is provided about loan terms, repayment schedules, or redemption policies on the website.
pros: Veteran-owned and operated business supporting military community
Open seven days a week with extended hours (9am-6pm) for accessibility
Federal Firearms Licensed dealer offering firearm transfers ($45 first, $15 each additional)
Accepts wide variety of collateral items beyond typical pawns (vehicles, motorcycles, musical instruments)
Transparent 20% monthly interest rate stated upfront on all loans
Physical Colorado Springs location with published address and phone number for in-person service
Online presence through ARMSLIST and downloadable FFL documentation for credibility
cons: 20% monthly interest rate (240% APR) is extremely high compared to traditional lending and most payday alternatives
Website lacks critical loan details: repayment terms, grace periods, item redemption policies, and consequences of non-payment
Limited contact options (phone and in-person only); no online application, email, or digital loan management mentioned
No customer reviews or ratings visible on website to assess borrower satisfaction or complaint history
Heavily firearms-focused marketing may not reflect equal service quality or rates for non-firearm collateral
best_for: Gun owners needing rapid firearm transfers or ammunition sales within Colorado Springs area
Individuals with jewelry, electronics, or collectibles requiring immediate cash and unable to access traditional loans
Veteran community members seeking to support a veteran-owned local business
Short-term emergency borrowers with valuable collateral who cannot qualify for bank loans or payday alternatives
diagnosis: Let's Make A Deal Pawn & Gun is best for Colorado Springs residents with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and cannot access traditional lending, particularly gun owners needing FFL services. The critical caveat is the 20% monthly interest rate (240% APR)—substantially higher than credit unions, payday alternatives under 36% APR, or personal loans—making it suitable only for genuine short-term emergencies where no other options exist.
services: Pawn loans on firearms, jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, tools, and vehicles
Cash purchases of gold, silver, and diamond jewelry
Firearm transfers at $45 (first) and $15 (additional same-day) rates
FFL licensing services for firearms shipment verification
Online firearms marketplace access through ARMSLIST
Electronics and gaming system pawns and sales
Camera and musical instrument pawns and sales
